_meta.name: tc_champion
_meta.label: TC Champion  'Daily Driver'  (2ct · all regimes · 8/9 WFA windows)
_meta.description: Safe TC eval config. Three-cylinder engine: IB breakout + pullback retest + dynamic scaling. v3.2: overnight_position v2 classifier — skip the bad zone (0.20–0.40 overnight position: 18–36% WR, -$3,679 in 5yr history) + TRENDING bias on extremes (pos≥0.85→LONG, pos≤0.20→SHORT). Data-proven: +64% P&L vs v3.1 baseline, Sharpe 3.76 vs 2.22, MaxDD improved, WFA 8/9 windows profitable.
_meta.use_when: Starting a TC eval. Default choice when regime is unclear or mixed.
_meta.do_not_use_when: You want to minimize DLL risk above all else (use xfa_conservative instead).

risk_rules.note: If first trade of day loses and session_pnl < -500, close platform. Two 4ct stops in a row approaches DLL.

v32_changes.overnight_skip_lo_hi: 0.20–0.40: skip moderate bearish lean days. Data: 30 trades, 18–36% WR, -$3,679 losses in 5yr. LONGs fight overnight trend, SHORTs don't fire. No-man's land.
v32_changes.overnight_trending_pos_hi: 0.85: if RTH opens in top 15% of overnight range → bulls held overnight → LONG bias
v32_changes.overnight_trending_pos_lo: 0.20: if RTH opens in bottom 20% of overnight range → bears held overnight → SHORT bias
v32_changes.why_v1_failed: v1 used rth_open > overnight_high + 2pt which fires ~1×/3yr for 23h futures. v2 measures WHERE in the range RTH opens, not whether it exceeds the range.

v31_changes.no_entry_after_hour: 12 → 14: afternoon breakouts 57% WR +$2,932 were blocked by noon cutoff
v31_changes.lunch_end_hour: new: 13 (aligned with tc_trader.py which was already correct)
v31_changes.retest_cutoff: new: 12:30 — afternoon retests 30% WR -$738 eliminated, morning retests kept (+$332)

vs_v31.trades_delta: -3 (262 vs 265) — skip zone removes 30, TRENDING bias adds ~27 high-conviction trades

pending_experiments.vwap_reclaim_first_entry: NOT the second-entry version. Real VWAP reclaim = first entry when price bounces off VWAP with volume. Needs fresh implementation, not the stop-out re-entry version. Test separately.
pending_experiments.gap_fill_skip: REJECTED — GAP_FILL_DOWN days are good (51.3% WR, $106/t avg). Never skip.
pending_experiments.retest_cylinder_review: v3.2 retest = 57t / 32% WR / -$121. Marginally negative. Was +$214 in v3.1. Monitor — may need retest_zone_pts tuning or further cutoff tightening.
pending_experiments.atr_low_vol_filter: 2023-H2 still weak in WFA (-$1,173). min_atr_ratio=0.8 candidate. Test before adding.
pending_experiments.tc_pass_rate_rerun: tc_pass_rate_pct null — rerun with --tc-sim to update. WFA windows changed from 6 to 9.
